name: Sariel
bio:
Heavenly Guardian who fell to the mortal world and lost his memory. He regained his power as a mortal knight, became an Angel of the Spirit Heroes Faction, and swore to protect the Heavenly Realm and threatened lives.

Role: Shield Protection
Specialty: A frontline Protection-type hero that can continuously provide high-value shields for itself.

skillSlots.name: Holy Light Guardian
skillSlots.description: Grants a Shield equal to 20% Max HP to self and the ally with lowest DEF, lasting 2 turns.

skillSlots.name: Sword of Nemesis
skillSlots.description: Attacks all enemies, dealing 100% M.DMG with 80% probability to inflict [ATK Down I] on the column containing the enemy with highest Crit.

effects.name: Holy Shield
effects.description: Casting [Holy Light Guardian] applies [Holy Guardian] to your army.

effects.name: Holy Shield
effects.description: [Sword of Nemesis] deals additional M.DMG equal to 10% of self's Max HP.

effects.name: Holy Shield
effects.description: Recovers 15% Max HP when casting [Sword of Nemesis].

effects.name: Holy Shield
effects.description: Dispels all Debuffs from self after receiving 9 active attacks.
